programme.title: Tracking Lions

programme.title: Glory Days

programme.title: Cashing In
programme.desc: Full holds and iced decks full of pots increase the risk of tipping over.

programme.title: Bering Sea Swim Club
programme.desc: Sig and Phil reclaim their junior deckhands with a high seas transfer.

programme.title: Lousiana Spearfishing and Bowfishing
programme.desc: Steven Rinella returns to the coast of Louisiana to spearfish and bowfish with Ronnie Collins and Greg Fonts. With ideal conditions, Steve receives a last minute invitation from Ronnie to spearfish during the reintroduced spring Amberjack season. Afterwards, the crew stays up for a late evening of bowfishing for red drum.

programme.title: MeatEater - Montana Muzzleloader Hunting for Mule Deer
programme.desc: Steven Rinella takes on Montana’s week-long big game heritage season with a traditional muzzleloader. With flintlock in hand, Steve’s after mule deer in a desolate and broken sage brush landscape. After a long few months of evading hunters, these deer have perfected how to stay alive. But stalking a deer into range isn’t the only hurdle to navigate.

programme.title: MeatEater - Texas Turkey with Luke Combs
programme.desc: Steven Rinella returns to the Yturria Ranch in south Texas, this time, to hunt turkeys and pigs with country musician Luke Combs. Their plans to chase the spring thunder shifts as the weather has a different idea.

programme.title: MeatEater - Welcome to Tanzania
programme.desc: Steven Rinella travels to Tanzania for his first African safari with professional hunter, Morgan Potter. In this episode, Morgan and his team show Steve the ropes of hunting in this foreign terrain for otherworldly big game species. Steve's quest for a cape buffalo moves to the side burner when the team discovers an impressive roan antelope.

programme.title: MeatEater - Into the Clouds: Sitka Blacktail Deer
programme.desc: Steven Rinella charters a float plane to drop off on a remote lake in Alaskas coastal rainforest for a solo.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Sweetest Meat: Alaskan Black Bear
programme.desc: As summer turns to fall, Steve heads into the backcountry of Alaska's Chugach Range.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Waters Edge: Waterfowl in Alaska
programme.desc: For a waterfowler's dream hunt, Steven Rinella joins his friend, wildlife biologist Brandt Meixell, on a remote trip to some untouched Alaska wetlands in search of ducks and geese. With a spread of decoys and a loyal retriever, they try to get their limit and fill their bellies with willow-spit roasted whole duck.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Rugged Peaks: Alaskan Mountain Goat
programme.desc: Every year, a handful of hunters draw a mountain goat permit to hunt the Mills Creek region of Alaskas Kenai.

programme.title: MeatEater - The New American Food Chain: Wild Pigs
programme.desc: On this trip, Steve travels to the Sacramento Valley in central California in search of a new challenge.

programme.title: MeatEater - Brotherhood, Badlands, and Pack Llamas: Montana Mule Deer
programme.desc: With a trio of cantankerous, spit-hurling pack llamas, Steven heads out.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Roughest Country: Texas Aoudad Sheep
programme.desc: Steven Rinella heads into the mountainous desert backcountry of west Texas after Barbary sheep, or Aoudad. These introduced sheep from North Africa are hard to find and harder to hunt. Challenged by the harsh environment, rugged terrain, and elusive sheep, Steve finds this hunt to be one of the most difficult he has ever undertaken.

programme.title: MeatEater - Canyon Bottoms and Cookouts: Texas Javelina
programme.desc: Steven Rinella takes to the canyons of the West Texas desert in search of javelina. In this broken, rocky terrain finding these unique critters isn't easy and getting a clear shot on a skunk pig with a bow is a whole other story. But Steve is inspired by the evidence of he finds of ancient hunters that used the area to prepare a meal that honors both the animal and our hunting ancestors.

programme.title: MeatEater - Big Bucks and Small Game: Wisconsin Whitetail Deer
programme.desc: Steven Rinella heads to Wisconsin to spend a few days on his buddys historical family farm to hunt small game.

programme.title: MeatEater - Big Sky, Bigger Birds: Montana Wild Turkey
programme.desc: Steven Rinella and his brother Matt load up the llamas for a backcountry spring Turkey hunt in Montana's Powder River Breaks. They will pack deep into the rugged badlands to find gobbling birds. With two tags each, there's plenty of action and camp-fried turkey schnitzel is on the menu.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Fair Chase: Arizona Mountain Lion
programme.desc: In the harsh desert Southwest, Steven Rinella has come to learn the truth about tracking a mountain lions.

programme.title: MeatEater - Crossing Borders: Mexican Bison
programme.desc: Steven Rinella heads into the mountains of the Sonora Desert on a true, wild, free-ranging bison hunt.

programme.title: MeatEater - Strange Hunt in a Strange Land: New Zealand Red Stag
programme.desc: Steven Rinella is on New Zealand's South Island for a do-it-yourself, free-range hunt for the majestic red stag. But first, he needs to secure some camp meat in the form of wild lamb. Battling weather and wary game in mountainous terrain, he uses his spot-and-stalk hunting skills to discover Kiwi red stags are a trophy worthy of the wall and the cook pot.

programme.title: MeatEater - Bush Pig: New Zealand Wild Boar
programme.desc: Steven Rinella and local pig hunting expert, Darren Moore, spend a wild, action-packed day tracking down Captain Cook boars in the thick New Zealand bush. Their tools for the job include two tough little pig dogs, a knife, and some real grit. Wild pigs are dangerous critters and this is as visceral as a hunt gets. Along the way, Steve learns a new technique for field-prepping whole hogs.

programme.title: Capítulo 144
programme.desc: Gastón invites Mia out on a date. Giovanni's fake parents aren't what they seem. Vico follows Celina to find out her secret appointment. Carlo tells Roberta he has a surprise for her. Franco and Valeria come to see if Mia lied about staying at school so she could go out with Gastón.

programme.title: Capítulo 145
programme.desc: Carlo and Roberta go drag racing. Giovanni tries to ride a horse. Vico realizes the place Celina visited. Nico tries to ruin Lupita's date. León has Diego fight his anger out. Raquel finds out Giovanni lied. Diego give Nico his guitar; Nico sees the matching shoes in Diego, Tomás, Giovanni's room. Roberta and Carlo are arrested; revealing Mia's lie.

programme.title: Capítulo 146
programme.desc: Franco finds out Mia isn't with Carlo and Roberta. Paola begs for Diego's forgiveness, which he gives, but refuses to take her back. Mia and Gastón go out on a date. Vico calls Celina's mom to stop her from making a life change. Carlo and Robert go search for Mia. Celina's mom sets her up on a date; however, the date proves to be beneficial to Celina. Roberta ruins Simon's date by saying she's pregnant and underage.

programme.title: Capítulo 147
programme.desc: Nico breaks up with Karen. Gastón tells Mia he wants to speak to her dad. Teo receives a gift. Simon plans to get Roberta back for flattening his tires. Paola lies to Roberta that her and Diego are back together to get revenge. Miguel tells Teo he will take his place at the Lodge initiation.

programme.title: Capítulo 148
programme.desc: León gives Diego a brand new car; Roberta crashes it. Gastón confronts Mia about her lingering feelings for Miguel. The Lodge figures out Miguel took Teo place; the later kidnap and torture Teo. Miguel and Mia kiss. Nico is told by Karen's father that the band is no longer welcome at his club. Giovanni, Diego, and Tomás put Madariaga's picture on an online dating site.

programme.title: Capítulo 149
programme.desc: Nico is upset about Karen's father, Jacobo's, decision about the band. Gastón orders Mia to call her father so they can talk. Teo is tied up by the Lodge and tortured. Diego finds out it was Roberta who crashed his car. Viviana misleads Franco to get Mia in trouble. The other band members try to convince Diego to come back to the band; without him they can't perform at the club. José's tutor comes to take her out but also to tell her to get close to Gastón. Gastón follows Mia and sees the band.

programme.title: Capítulo 150
programme.desc: The band finds out Gastón saw them perform; Miguel blames Mia, the others agree. Giovanni tries to rescue Teo but they are both caught and tortured. Nico tells his mother that he is in love with Lupita, not Karen. It's revealed that Pilar is in the Lodge. Viviana threatens Mia that she will tell Franco; later writes a fake fan letter even after Miguel asked her not to. Nico's mom tells Lupita to break up with Nico if she loves him.

programme.title: Capítulo 151
programme.desc: Giovanni climbs through the vents, onto the roof, then falls where he is later found by Tomás and Lupita. Gastón rebuffs Mia. Miguel, Diego, Tomás and Nico try to get Gandia to listen to them about the Lodge. A woman from the online dating site confronts a confused Madariaga. Gastón receives a love note from Mia. Roberta disrespectfully embarrasses Alma in front of Carlo and the others; however she is mistaken. Madariaga and the other boys help save Teo.

programme.title: Capítulo 152
programme.desc: Gandia and Mendiola want to act like the Lodge doesn't exist. Miguel tries to draw the Lodge out. Franco tells Mia that Valeria will move in. Diego curses Giovanni and calls him a traitor. The kids are lied to about Teo's condition. The Lodge plans revenge on Miguel. Mia decides to play Valeria's game. Giovanni reflects on the good and bad. José makes a deal with Gastón so she can see Teo; she tells his father she's his girlfriend; she reveals her true feelings.

programme.title: El colchón viejo
programme.desc: Magdalena sells her old mattress to Jorjais, unaware that Arturo keeps his savings there. Cris asks Pedro to formalize their relationship.

programme.title: Los quince años
programme.desc: It is Germán's 15th anniversary working in the building and is celebrated with a party. Frankie Rivers has a creative crisis.

programme.title: La gran fuga
programme.desc: There is a leak in one of the gas tanks and Germán is in charge of repairing it. Benito has a casting for the Rocky movie.

programme.title: Arturo sastre
programme.desc: Arturo takes out his old sewing machine to dedicate himself to sewing. Vanesa brings a rooster with Alzheimer's into the building that crows all day.

programme.title: El trabajo de Alejandra
programme.desc: The López Pérez need an extra income of money and Alejandra goes out to look for a job. Benito meets a friend from the castings and invites him to the apartment.

programme.title: La gotera
programme.desc: A leak in the López Pérez bathroom causes leaks in Pedro's apartment. Benito and Liz go to a casting for the musical Grease.

programme.title: Mi amiga Virginia
programme.desc: Virginia is left homeless and jobless. Germán decides to give her asylum and she becomes everyone's best friend. Luis signs up for Zumba classes online.

programme.title: Fiesta de casados
programme.desc: Luis feels lonely and Silvia encourages him to organize a meeting in the apartment. Luis invites the married men in the building. Vanesa entrusts Germán with a little bird with behavior problems.

programme.title: San Antonio
programme.desc: Germán and Jorjáis accidentally break Silvia's San Antonio statue. The López Pérez family complain about the high water consumption in the building.

programme.title: No se peleen
programme.desc: Germán and Jorjáis fight over Borre's last taco and they stop talking. Vanesa leaves Benito in charge of a cat.

programme.title: El álbum
programme.desc: Germán and Jorjáis find a photo album in the garbage and through it they remember the best of the worst of the neighbors.

programme.title: Germán por un día
programme.desc: Germán gets sick and the neighbors decide to help him with the building work. Magdalena invents a trip to Paris to show off to her friend.

programme.title: Embarazo
programme.desc: Germán has the task of planting small trees that the mayor's office has given them. Someone in the building is pregnant.

programme.title: ¡Voy a ser papá!
programme.desc: Silvia le confiesa a Luis que está embarazada y él comienza a comprar muchas cosas para el bebé. Magdalena y su familia se vuelven ricos y comienzan a derrochar su dinero.

programme.title: La casa de las Lomas
programme.desc: Magdalena les dice a los vecinos que ella y su familia se mudarán a Las Lomas y le pide a Luis comprarle una mansión.

programme.title: Perdimos todo
programme.desc: Luis comienza a molestar a Silvia todo el tiempo queriendo controlar lo que hace para cuidar del bebé. Magdalena invierte todo su dinero en una empresa fantasma y pierde todo.

programme.title: Luisito, corazón de plomo
programme.desc: Magda le dice a Luis que no pueden mudarse a su mansión y le pide de vuelta las llaves del departamento, pero él se niega a dejarlos vivir en en edificio otra vez y todos los vecinos tratan de convencerlo de darles otra oportunidad.

programme.title: El muñeco vudú
programme.desc: Germán y Jorjáis encuentran un muñeco vudú, asumen que alguien está haciendo brujería en el edificio. Pedro, Cris y Vanesa tienen problemas con el WiFi de su departamento.

programme.title: Sortilegio
programme.desc: Alejandro returns home after a terrible accident to discover that he is married to Maria Jose, a poor, innocent girl who was deceived by Alejandro's brother Bruno. Bruno used Alejandro's name to marry Maria Jose, soon after he sent to kill his brother in hopes that Maria Jose would inherit Alejandro's fortune. But when Maria Jose arrives at the mansion she realizes that Bruno lied to her and used her. She is also scared when Alejandro is found alive and returns home. Doctors tell Alejandro that he suffers from memory loss but he is convinced he never met Maria Jose before and goes in search of the truth, but during this time and Maria Jose actually fall in love, while Bruno and Maura (Alejandro's ex-girlfriend) plot to break them up. Meanwhile, the brothers' mother Victoria has fallen in love with Fernando--Alejandro's best friend, so closer to his age than hers.

programme.desc: A protective mother tries to hide her daughter deputies - and consequences; police search for the key to a mysterious glove compartment; a rideshare driver gets pulled over when her passenger raises deputies' suspicions.

programme.title: Red in the Face
programme.desc: Emotions run high after a mom with a warrant fails to elude deputies; police pull over a habitual traffic offender after they spot him behind the wheel; cops roll up to a reported fight and find evidence of a bloody argument.

programme.title: Out of Breath
programme.desc: A wanted burglary suspect exhausts himself after jumping too many fences. Officers engage in a tense standoff with a felon who won't come out of his grandma's house. Things go south for a man with a questionable-looking moped.

programme.title: Front Seat Fumble
programme.desc: A convenience store confrontation turns into a parking lot skirmish. An uncoordinated car passenger attracts deputies' attention. A suspicious man swears he peeked into a closed store because he wanted to read their menu.

programme.title: Salt and Dash
programme.desc: Nerves get the better of one woman when she tries to elude a deputy on a bike; deputies come to a decision after two animated exes tell their sides of the story; a man's choice in seasonings raises a red flag for police.

programme.title: Parental Guidance
programme.desc: An unlucky family gets a rude awakening when a drunk driver crashes out in their driveway; a suspended license doesn't stop a man from driving his dad home; a car full of teens gets pulled over on their way to a movie.

programme.title: Brush With Trouble
programme.desc: Vehicles peel out of a parking lot when officers arrive to break up a street race; a goofy driver tries to crack jokes to lessen the seriousness of his mistake; a wanted woman cares more about her oral hygiene than her warrant.

programme.title: Instant Regret
programme.desc: An apologetic motorcyclist is lucky to be alive after crashing out on a dark road; deputies question two passengers during a traffic stop; a young driver admits his situation doesn't look good when police pull him over.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A woman's birthday ends with a foot pursuit; deputies are skeptical when a suspect claims he was given a freebie; Grandma comes to the rescue when a scared teen gets pulled over without a license.

programme.title: Capítulo 144
programme.desc: Gastón invites Mia out on a date. Giovanni's fake parents aren't what they seem. Vico follows Celina to find out her secret appointment. Carlo tells Roberta he has a surprise for her. Franco and Valeria come to see if Mia lied about staying at school so she could go out with Gastón.

programme.title: Capítulo 145
programme.desc: Carlo and Roberta go drag racing. Giovanni tries to ride a horse. Vico realizes the place Celina visited. Nico tries to ruin Lupita's date. León has Diego fight his anger out. Raquel finds out Giovanni lied. Diego give Nico his guitar; Nico sees the matching shoes in Diego, Tomás, Giovanni's room. Roberta and Carlo are arrested; revealing Mia's lie.

programme.title: Capítulo 146
programme.desc: Franco finds out Mia isn't with Carlo and Roberta. Paola begs for Diego's forgiveness, which he gives, but refuses to take her back. Mia and Gastón go out on a date. Vico calls Celina's mom to stop her from making a life change. Carlo and Robert go search for Mia. Celina's mom sets her up on a date; however, the date proves to be beneficial to Celina. Roberta ruins Simon's date by saying she's pregnant and underage.

programme.title: Capítulo 147
programme.desc: Nico breaks up with Karen. Gastón tells Mia he wants to speak to her dad. Teo receives a gift. Simon plans to get Roberta back for flattening his tires. Paola lies to Roberta that her and Diego are back together to get revenge. Miguel tells Teo he will take his place at the Lodge initiation.

programme.title: Capítulo 148
programme.desc: León gives Diego a brand new car; Roberta crashes it. Gastón confronts Mia about her lingering feelings for Miguel. The Lodge figures out Miguel took Teo place; the later kidnap and torture Teo. Miguel and Mia kiss. Nico is told by Karen's father that the band is no longer welcome at his club. Giovanni, Diego, and Tomás put Madariaga's picture on an online dating site.

programme.title: Capítulo 149
programme.desc: Nico is upset about Karen's father, Jacobo's, decision about the band. Gastón orders Mia to call her father so they can talk. Teo is tied up by the Lodge and tortured. Diego finds out it was Roberta who crashed his car. Viviana misleads Franco to get Mia in trouble. The other band members try to convince Diego to come back to the band; without him they can't perform at the club. José's tutor comes to take her out but also to tell her to get close to Gastón. Gastón follows Mia and sees the band.

programme.title: Capítulo 150
programme.desc: The band finds out Gastón saw them perform; Miguel blames Mia, the others agree. Giovanni tries to rescue Teo but they are both caught and tortured. Nico tells his mother that he is in love with Lupita, not Karen. It's revealed that Pilar is in the Lodge. Viviana threatens Mia that she will tell Franco; later writes a fake fan letter even after Miguel asked her not to. Nico's mom tells Lupita to break up with Nico if she loves him.

programme.title: Capítulo 151
programme.desc: Giovanni climbs through the vents, onto the roof, then falls where he is later found by Tomás and Lupita. Gastón rebuffs Mia. Miguel, Diego, Tomás and Nico try to get Gandia to listen to them about the Lodge. A woman from the online dating site confronts a confused Madariaga. Gastón receives a love note from Mia. Roberta disrespectfully embarrasses Alma in front of Carlo and the others; however she is mistaken. Madariaga and the other boys help save Teo.

programme.title: Capítulo 152
programme.desc: Gandia and Mendiola want to act like the Lodge doesn't exist. Miguel tries to draw the Lodge out. Franco tells Mia that Valeria will move in. Diego curses Giovanni and calls him a traitor. The kids are lied to about Teo's condition. The Lodge plans revenge on Miguel. Mia decides to play Valeria's game. Giovanni reflects on the good and bad. José makes a deal with Gastón so she can see Teo; she tells his father she's his girlfriend; she reveals her true feelings.

programme.title: Leandro Díaz

programme.title: Me caiste del cielo
programme.desc: Una interesante producción, matizada por la tragi-comedia en la que un hombre rescata al dueño de una taquerÍa, quien se encuentra en una situación de inminente riesgo.

programme.title: Las golfas
programme.desc: La prostituta Diana es echada del cabaret de donde trabaja y Luis la aloja sin ningún interés. Luis es introducido en el tráfico de drogas que encabeza Emiliano, quien pretende a Diana. Ambos tratan de escapar, pero los problemas los siguen a donde vayan.

programme.title: La verdadera vocación de Magdalena
programme.desc: A young girl is shy and repressed due to her mother's influence, but one day she meets a musician and goes through a radical transformation.

programme.title: Guadalajara es México
programme.desc: "Cantante Cornelio Reyna regresa Guadalajara a proponerle matrimonio a su novia de la infancia Silvia. Esto deprime a uno de los pretendientes de Silvia, quien pronto va a desatar una serie de infortunios"

programme.title: El complot mongol
programme.desc: A cop must prevent China's plot against the US president visiting Mexico. While investigating Chinatown, Filiberto risks his life and falls for young Marta, in a noir-style detective story.
